notes.january_2026_update: Major mod system rework on 2026-01-21: Mods now have FIXED substats instead of random rolls. Legacy mods (pre-update) retain random rolled stats.
notes.data_completeness: Some values marked as null are not publicly documented. Weapon stats can vary by tier (I-V) and calibration level.
notes.substat_system: Post-update mods have fixed substats at levels 1-17, with 'Shiny' versions at level 17 having slightly higher main stats.

sniper_rifles.name: SN700 - Gulped Lore
special_effects: 80% chance to trigger explosion on weakspot hit

lmgs.name: MG4 Predator
special_effects: 40% chance on hit to trigger Fast Gunner state, increasing fire rate and attack

melee.name: Long Axe
special_effects: Passive: +5% melee swing speed per stack, up to 3 stacks
Heavy attacks activate Fortress Warfare (10s cooldown)
Each enemy struck grants +8% crit rate for all weapons for 10s

melee.name: Kukri
special_effects: On kill: increases attack and crit rate

3_piece.effect: Crouching and remaining still for 0.5s activates 'Bastille state': Weapon DMG +40%. Upon exiting, sprinting disabled for 3s, stamina consumption +100%.

4_piece.effect: After leaving Bastille state for 3s, gain 1 stack of 'Armor' per second (max 60). While in Bastille state, each Armor stack provides shield = 1% max HP. If shield depleted during Bastille state, receive 30% vulnerability.

3_piece.effect: Landing 2 crit weapon hits grants 1 stack of 'Lonely Shadow': Crit DMG +6% for 30s, stacks up to 8 times.

4_piece.effect: Max Lonely Shadow stacks increased to 10. After a kill, Crit Rate +8% for 2s.

3_piece.effect: When stamina above 90%, Crit Rate +5% and Crit DMG +20%.

4_piece.effect: Max stamina +25. Killing an enemy instantly restores 30 stamina.

3_piece.effect: Consecutively hitting same enemy grants 'Archer's Focus': Weakspot DMG +4% per stack (max 10). Switching targets halves current stacks.

4_piece.effect: When reloading, for every 1% weakspot hits from previous magazine, load additional 0.6% ammo (max 30% extra bullets).

3_piece.effect: After melee kill, next melee attack within 5s deals +25% damage, melee swing speed +15%.

4_piece.effect: Melee kill instantly restores 30 stamina, movement speed +20% for 2s. 3s cooldown.

3_piece.effect: Precise kill grants 'Bullet Saver': Weakspot DMG +15% for 8s, stacks up to 3 times.

4_piece.effect: After killing an enemy, reload speed +20%. Weakspot kill also increases fire rate +10%. Effects removed upon reloading or switching weapons.

3_piece.effect: While undetected by enemies, Weapon DMG and Item DMG +20%.

4_piece.effect: Movement speed +12%. When HP below 50%, stamina regenerates 20% faster.

2_piece.effect: Elemental DMG (Blaze, Frost, Shock, Blast) +8%, Reload Speed +15%

3_piece.effect: After killing an enemy, movement speed +20% for 2s, Status DMG +40% diminishing over 8s.

4_piece.effect: For each enemy within 5m radius, gain 4% DMG reduction (max 4 stacks).

helmet.name: Momentum Up
helmet.effect: First 50% of magazine: Fire Rate +10%. Next 50%: Weapon DMG +30%.

helmet.name: Fateful Strike
helmet.effect: Disables Weakspot DMG, but Crit Rate +10% and Crit DMG +30%.

helmet.name: Work Of Proficiency
helmet.effect: Reloading empty magazine: Reload Speed +10% and Elemental DMG +20% for 5s. Resets on next reload.

helmet.name: First-Move Advantage
helmet.effect: For 2s after reloading: Crit Rate +10% and Crit DMG +20%.

helmet.name: Deviation Expert
helmet.effect: Range -25%, but Fire Rate +10% and Status DMG +20%.

helmet.name: Precise Strike
helmet.effect: Weakspot hit: Weakspot DMG +12% for 3s, stacks up to 3 times.

helmet.name: Mag Expansion
helmet.effect: Reloading empty magazine increases capacity by 30%.

helmet.name: Elemental Havoc
helmet.effect: Elemental DMG +10%. When HP above 90%, additional +10% Elemental DMG.

top.name: Resist Advantage
top.effect: DMG Reduction +10% when enemies within 7m. Taking melee DMG grants additional +10% DMG Reduction for 5s.

top.name: Head Guard
top.effect: When HP above 70%, head is no longer a Weakspot.

top.name: Critical Rescue
top.effect: When HP drops below 30%: DMG Reduction +20% and Healing Received +20%.

top.name: Rejuvenating
top.effect: Using healing shot: Movement Speed +20% for 2s and fully refills magazine from inventory (up to 100%).

top.name: Quick Comeback
top.effect: When HP above 70%: Healing from all sources +25%.

top.name: Enduring Shield
top.effect: Out of combat: Gain 1 stack of Safe Haven every 5s (max 5). Every 5 hits received consumes 1 stack for 8% HP shield for 3s.

top.name: Head-on Conflict
top.effect: Enemies within 7m: DMG Reduction +10%. Taking melee DMG: additional +10% DMG Reduction for 5s.

top.name: Healing Fortification
top.effect: When using healing shot: DMG Reduction +40% for 2s.

top.name: Status Immune
top.effect: When HP falls below 60%: All negative Deviated states purged. 15s cooldown.

bottoms.name: Precision Charge
bottoms.effect: Per 10% Weakspot hit percentage from last magazine: Elemental DMG +4% for 10s (max 24%). Resets on reload.

bottoms.name: Unstoppable
bottoms.effect: Hitting enemy from 20m+: Weakspot DMG +10%. Each additional meter beyond 20: +1% Weakspot DMG (max 20%).

bottoms.name: Melee Momentum
bottoms.effect: Melee DMG +20%. Melee kill restores 30% Max Stamina.

bottoms.name: Status Amplification
bottoms.effect: When magazine empty: Status DMG +10% for 12s, stacks up to 3 times.

bottoms.name: Bullet Siphon
bottoms.effect: Weapon DMG +5%. Per 5 rounds missing from magazine: Weapon DMG +4% (max 20%). Resets on reload.

bottoms.name: Three Strikes
bottoms.effect: First 3 hits after reloading (not exceeding 50% mag capacity): Weakspot DMG +30%.

bottoms.name: Reload Rampage
bottoms.effect: Reloading grants Weapon DMG +5%. Per 5 bullets consumed: Weapon DMG +4% (max 20%).

bottoms.name: Deadshot
bottoms.effect: Each Crit hit with non-melee weapon: Crit DMG +5%, stacks up to 45%. Removed on reload.

shoes.name: Slow and Steady
shoes.effect: Melee/Weapon/Status DMG +10%. When HP above 90%: additional +10%.

shoes.name: Covered Advance
shoes.effect: Taking no damage for 4s: Melee/Weapon/Status DMG +20% for 30s.

shoes.name: Secluded Strike
shoes.effect: No enemies within 7m: Weapon DMG and Status DMG +15%.

shoes.name: Ferocious Charge
shoes.effect: Killing enemy within 10m: Melee/Weapon/Status DMG +20% for 8s.

shoes.name: Rush Hour
shoes.effect: Per 10% decrease in HP: Melee/Weapon/Status DMG +4%.

shoes.name: Ruthless Reaper
shoes.effect: After 2 enemy kills: Magazine refilled from reserves without reloading.

gloves.name: Elemental Amplifier
gloves.effect: Reloading empty magazine: Status DMG +10% for 12s, stacks up to 3 times.

universal.name: Flame Resonance
universal.effect: Max Burn stacks +2, but Burn duration -20%.

universal.name: Weakspot DMG Boost
universal.effect: Increases damage dealt to enemy Weakspots.

burn.name: Burning Wrath
burn.effect: 25% chance to inflict additional stack of Burn when triggering Burn effect.

burn.name: Embers
burn.effect: Associated with Burn status effect (damage/duration enhancement).

burn.name: Blaze Blessing
burn.effect: Killing enemy affected by Burn: Recover 5% HP.

power_surge.name: Surge Amplifier
power_surge.effect: Dealing Power Surge damage increases subsequent Power Surge DMG +5% for 3s, stacks up to 4 times.

power_surge.name: Static Shock
power_surge.effect: Power Surge DMG +20%, but Shock State duration -50%.

frost_vortex.name: Frosty Blessing
frost_vortex.effect: When Frost Vortex disappears: Recover 10% HP.

frost_vortex.name: Vortex Multiplier
frost_vortex.effect: Max Frost Vortexes +1, Frost Vortex DMG +10%.

bulls_eye.name: Spreading Marks
bulls_eye.effect: Related to The Bull's Eye status effect (mark spreading).

bulls_eye.name: Recover Mark
bulls_eye.effect: Related to The Bull's Eye (mark recovery/refresh).

bulls_eye.name: Vulnerability Amplifier
bulls_eye.effect: Vulnerability effect of The Bull's Eye +8%.

bulls_eye.name: Targeted Takedown
bulls_eye.effect: Crit Rate +20% against targets affected by The Bull's Eye.

fortress_warfare.name: Final Territory
fortress_warfare.effect: Upon ending Fortress Warfare state: Weapon DMG +10%, Movement Speed +10% for 10s.

fortress_warfare.name: Portable Territory
fortress_warfare.effect: After leaving Fortress Warfare state: Effect remains for 2s.

fortress_warfare.name: United We Stand
fortress_warfare.effect: Removes Super Armor but Attack +15% while in Fortress Warfare state.

unstable_bomber.name: Reckless Bomber
unstable_bomber.effect: For every 1% of crit rate, Unstable Bomber DMG +0.5%.

fast_gunner.name: Precision Rush
fast_gunner.effect: In Fast Gunner: Accuracy and Weakspot DMG gradually increase over 3s continuous fire, up to Accuracy +60, Weakspot DMG +60%.

bounce.name: Boomerang Bullet
bounce.effect: Each time Bounce deals damage: Trigger chance +2% (based on weapon trigger chance) for 5s, stacks up to 10 times. (Formerly 'Not Throw Away Your Shot')

bounce.name: Chain Bounce
bounce.effect: More bounces = higher damage, up to +45% (+7.5% per bounce). (Formerly 'Targeted Bounce')

substats.note: Post January 2026 update: Mods have FIXED substats at specific levels (1-17). Legacy mods retain random rolled values. Exact numerical ranges for each tier are not comprehensively documented publicly.

weakspot_dmg_percent.description: Increases damage to enemy weak points

elemental_dmg_percent.description: Increases elemental damage (Burn, Frost, Shock, Blast)

violent.description: First substat is always Critical Damage

precision.description: First substat is always Weakspot Damage

talents.description: First substat is always Elemental Damage

keyword_specific.description: First substat boosts specific keyword (Burn, Frost, etc.)
keyword_specific.notes: May have higher potential values than generalist substats

burn.name: Burn
burn.effect: Deals damage over time, can stack
burn.proc_behavior: Creates fiery area-of-effect explosions on enemy death

frost_vortex.name: Frost Vortex
frost_vortex.effect: Creates area that traps enemies and inflicts damage over time

power_surge.name: Power Surge
power_surge.effect: Deals 50% of PSI intensity as shock damage, applies -40 accuracy debuff for 6s

bounce.name: Bounce
bounce.proc_behavior: Single shot can hit multiple enemies

shrapnel.name: Shrapnel
shrapnel.effect: Single bullet hits multiple parts of an enemy simultaneously
shrapnel.proc_behavior: Deals 50% of attack as weapon damage to random different part

bulls_eye.name: The Bull's Eye
bulls_eye.proc_behavior: Base vulnerability 8%, can be increased with mods

fortress_warfare.name: Fortress Warfare
fortress_warfare.proc_behavior: Activated by specific actions (crouching, heavy attacks)

unstable_bomber.name: Unstable Bomber
unstable_bomber.proc_behavior: Chance to trigger explosion, especially on weakspot hits

Exact fire rates for many weapons
Reload speed values (dynamic, affected by mods/skills)
missing_armor_data: Base HP/PSI values for each armor tier
Complete list of armor pieces per tier
missing_mod_data: Exact numerical ranges for substats at each rarity tier (Common/Rare/Epic)
Complete list of all possible substats
New fixed-stat mod values post-January 2026 update (Level 1-17 progression)
